title: Senior LLM Engineer
description: Lead the design and deployment of production LLM systems. You'll work on fine-tuning, RAG pipelines, and evaluation frameworks that power our core product.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and optimize computer vision models for real-time inference. Collaborate with product teams to ship features from research to production.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Own the ML infrastructure stack: model serving, monitoring, CI/CD for ML pipelines, and cost optimization across cloud environments.

title: AI Product Manager
description: Define the roadmap for AI-powered features. Partner with engineering and design to ship user-facing products that leverage generative AI responsibly.

title: Junior Data Scientist
description: Analyze large datasets, build predictive models, and present findings to stakeholders. Great opportunity to grow into ML engineering.

title: AI Safety Researcher
description: Research alignment techniques, red-teaming, and evaluation benchmarks for large language models. Publish and collaborate with the broader AI safety community.
